_comment: User-facing text for intake/intake.gs. Edit here; changes are live within ~5 minutes (script cache TTL). Use {{placeholder}} syntax for dynamic values.
no_reply_disclaimer: ⚠ This message was sent from an unmonitored mailbox. Please do not reply to this email. For assistance, contact {{contact_email}}.
verify_email_subject: Please verify your email for MorphoCloud
verify_email_body:
Hello,

Thank you for submitting the MorphoCloud intake form.

Please click the link below to verify your email address:

{{verify_url}}

This link is unique to your submission. If you did not submit this form, please ignore this email.

— MorphoCloud Team
{{contact_email}}

⚠ This message was sent from an unmonitored mailbox. Please do not reply to this email. For assistance, contact {{contact_email}}.
page_error_missing_params:
❌ Invalid verification link.

The link is missing required parameters. Please resubmit the intake form.
page_error_config:
⚙️ Configuration error.

The response sheet is missing required columns. Please contact the MorphoCloud administrator.
page_error_invalid_token:
❌ Invalid or expired verification link.

Please resubmit the intake form.
page_already_verified:
✅ Already verified.

Your email was already verified. If you have not yet accepted the GitHub organization invitation, visit github.com/settings/organizations.
page_success_header:
✅ Email verified successfully!

Your MorphoCloud {{path_label}} registration is complete.
invite_team_note_individual: You have been invited to the MorphoCloud GitHub organization.
invite_team_note_workshop: You have been invited to the MorphoCloud GitHub organization as a Workshop Organizer.
invite_msg_invited:
⚠️ Action required within 7 days

{{team_note}} GitHub invitations expire after 7 days.

Accept your invitation now:

  1. Go to github.com/settings/organizations
  2. Find the pending invitation from MorphoCloud
  3. Click Accept
invite_msg_already_member: You were already an organization member and have been added to the appropriate team directly.
invite_msg_skipped: You appear to already have a pending or active membership in the MorphoCloud GitHub organization. If you have not yet accepted an invitation, visit github.com/settings/organizations.
invite_msg_failure: Your email has been verified, but we were unable to send a GitHub organization invitation automatically. Please contact us at {{contact_email}} quoting this error: {{error_code}}
